message:
feat(ingest): Add OSC 133 semantic prompt marker parsing

Implement shell integration parsing for semantic prompts:
- Osc133Marker enum (PromptStart/CommandStart/CommandExecuted/CommandFinished)
- ShellState enum to track prompt vs command running states
- Osc133State struct for per-pane state tracking
- parse_osc133_markers() function with robust parsing (handles BEL/ST terminators)
- 12 comprehensive tests covering parsing and state transitions

Also adds PaneRegistry to_pane_records() helpers and fixes
logging.rs test imports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
